name: Minestrone
tagline: Italian vegetable-bean-pasta soup, the recipe shifts with the season
highlight: Eight vegetables, beans, pasta — no nuts, all season

hero.alt: Bowl of minestrone with beans, pasta, and chopped vegetables
hero.caption: minestrone — clear-broth italian vegetable soup

healthFacts: Naturally nut-free; loads of fiber from beans and vegetables.
Cannellini beans add ~13g protein per cup with zero saturated fat.
Tomato + basil + olive oil is the Mediterranean trio — synergistic antioxidants.

steps.title: Build the soffritto
steps.detail: Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven. Add diced onion, carrot, celery — the holy trinity. Cook 8 minutes until softened. Add garlic last 60 seconds.
steps.tip: Cut everything to the same size — they cook evenly and look like one dish.

steps.title: Add tomatoes and stock
steps.detail: Pour in crushed tomatoes and stock. Bring to a simmer. Cook gently 20 minutes for flavors to meld.
steps.tip: A parmesan rind tossed in adds enormous savory depth.

steps.title: Beans and zucchini
steps.detail: Add drained beans and diced zucchini. Simmer 8 minutes until zucchini is tender but holding shape.
steps.tip: Mash a quarter of the beans against the pot for natural body.

steps.title: Pasta and finish
steps.detail: Add pasta and cook until al dente, ~8 minutes. Off heat, tear in basil and drizzle olive oil. Serve with parmesan if you eat dairy.
steps.tip: Cooking pasta separately and adding portions on serving keeps leftovers from getting bloated.
